demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult child present and made the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I went to the toilet and the bowl was completely filled with bright red blood, and now I feel like I'm going to pass out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A huge amount of bright red blood came out suddenly when I went to the toilet, with no pain at all, and now I'm terribly weak and lightheaded.

symptom_narrative.onset: about an hour ago, suddenly, when I went to the toilet
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly one hour and I still feel awful
symptom_narrative.character: a large amount of bright red blood with clots in the toilet, and no pain whatsoever
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I feel like I'm about to pass out — very weak and dizzy, sweaty
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on all at once out of nowhere
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing seems to help; lying flat with my legs up is the only way I don't feel like fainting
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting up or trying to stand makes me feel like I'll black out
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very lightheaded, sweaty and weak; no tummy pain, no cramps, no vomiting, and I haven't brought up any blood
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before; my bowels were completely normal earlier today

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I was told I have little pouches in my bowel — they found them by chance about 5 years ago and they've never given me any trouble
I take a daily aspirin to protect my heart
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: started some years ago for heart protection

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: older adult living at home; adult child is here helping and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: the toilet bowl was completely full of bright red blood with clots
looks very pale and sweaty, lying flat on the floor with legs propped up on a chair, unable to sit up without becoming dizzy and looking like he might faint
adult child reports a large amount of fresh blood in the bathroom and says he keeps saying he feels faint and weak
